nasb.text: In Jerusalem he made engines of war invented by skillful men to be on the towers and on the corners for the purpose of shooting arrows and great stones. Hence his fame spread afar, for he was marvelously helped until he was strong.

esv.text: In Jerusalem he made machines, invented by skillful men, to be on the towers and the corners, to shoot arrows and great stones. And his fame spread far, for he was marvelously helped, till he was strong.

cnv.text: 他又在耶路撒冷製造巧匠發明的器械，安放在城樓和城角上，用來發射利箭和大石。烏西雅的名聲傳到遠方，因為他得了非常的幫助，使他十分強盛。

ccb.text: 又让巧匠在耶路撒冷设计和制造兵器，安放在城楼和角楼上，用来发射弓箭和石头。乌西雅威名远扬，因为他得到非常的帮助，极其强盛。
